## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Link the issue with "Closes #123" when applicable. -->

## Solution

<!-- Explain the smallest coherent solution and important design choices. -->

## Risk and security impact

<!-- Cover compatibility, migrations, auth, tenant/task isolation, secrets, and runtime effects. Write "None identified" only after checking. -->

## Validation

<!-- List exact commands and manual checks with outcomes. Explain anything not run. -->

## User-facing changes

<!-- Describe documentation and changelog impact. Only release PRs may change the product version. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR has one coherent purpose and no unrelated refactor.
- [ ] Behavior changes have tests, or I explained why a test is impractical.
- [ ] Relevant local checks pass.
- [ ] Public behavior, configuration, or architecture documentation is updated.
- [ ] Meaningful user, operator, or contributor impact is recorded under `Unreleased`.
- [ ] No secret, token, cookie, private target, personal data, or runtime artifact is included.
- [ ] Backend/frontend contracts remain synchronized where applicable.
- [ ] I reviewed AI-assisted output and remain responsible for the contribution.
- [ ] Product-version metadata is unchanged unless this is a maintainer release PR.
